updates.tweet_text:
Yesterday's newsletter was sent early at 2:50PM in preparation for a long in #ES_F: The Failed Breakdown of the 7408 low. At 3:08PM, we swept 7408 to 7405, recovered, & longed. We are +70

Plan today: Ride runner until next bear trap. 7492, 7510, 7530 magnet next. 39/25=supports https://t.co/KuDChg5WnJ
updates.notes: All prices mentioned (7408/7405=hindsight trade, 7492/7510/7530/7439/7425=morning plan levels) are existing plan levels or historical references. 7492 not in plan but framed as runner target/magnet, not a new named actionable level with naming language.

updates.tweet_text: @CorlukaDejan That would count, but not something I'd take (I won't trade today unless we lose yesterday's low)
updates.notes: No price level named; purely a conditional/behavioral statement about trading intent with no actionable price cited.

updates.tweet_text: @CorlukaDejan I am very strict though with my entries and won't take a Failed Breakdown unless its basically 100% win rate which means I need to wait for huge volatility expansions
updates.notes: Reply explaining entry discipline for Failed Breakdowns; no price levels named or actionable triggers given.

updates.tweet_text:

updates.tweet_text: @NorthoverDaniel @CorlukaDejan I keep my size mostly the same as it keeps emotions in control, but yes I've become very selective. There's no way to have a high win rate unless your sniping, typically no more than one trade a trade a day, if that. Best day traders I've known are doing 1-2 scalps per week
updates.notes: Pure conversational reply about trading style/frequency. No prices mentioned, no actionable levels named.

updates.tweet_text: Note: Watch for reclaims of 7425 now or Failed Breakdowns of yesterday's daily low

updates.tweet_text:

Watch recoveries of 7405 now to trigger to 7425+. 7383, 7365 are below now https://t.co/XKIMWRJWt9

updates.tweet_text: @CorlukaDejan When I say bears control in the newsletter I just mean we should expect bounces to have trouble sustaining. We will still get great bounces though. The best longs are when bears control

Targets were 7425, 7439 (both hit). 7472, 7492, 7510, 7530 next. 7530=magnet https://t.co/25nhLeOyDv
